case_title: SIERRA MUNIZ (MINOR) ET AL. VS. BOYS AND GIRLS CLUBS OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2012 - JUDGMENT.

ORDER ON APPLICATION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM-CIVIL [X] EX PARTE - GRANTED - JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-23-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROBERT K. CONNOLLY--PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUNIZ, SIERRA (MINOR) BROWN, SUZANNE ( GUARDIAN ) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOYS AND GIRLS CLUBS OF SAN FRANCISCO SERVE : ROBERT K.
